instruction: Reply with only the received power in dBW: 1W TX, 3dB TX gain, -140dB path loss, 5dB RX gain.
Reply with only the RSS pointing total in arcsec: knowledge 0.05 and jitter 0.07.
Reply with only the approximate total Delta-V in km/s for LEO 500km (28.5 deg) Hohmann to GEO with plane change at apogee.
For 600 km circular LEO, reply with only the approximate orbital period in minutes.
Reply with only the approximate max eclipse minutes for 600 km LEO (cylindrical umbra).
Size LEO battery Wh only: 50W average load, 35 min eclipse, 30% DoD, 95% discharge efficiency. Reply with only the number rounded to one decimal.
Reply with only the approximate propellant mass in kg for a 500 kg dry lunar lander, Isp 320s, 2500 m/s burn plus 10% margin.
Reply with only yes or no: do two parallel radios at 500 FIT each typically meet 99.9% one-year reliability?
CubeSat loses contact >48h — reply with only the mode name the FDIR should enter.
Reply with only the four hazard keywords for a pressurized lunar habitat, semicolon-separated.
